user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of asset email templates with their type, description and task, so that I can see which asset emails are configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns Template Type ID, Email type, Description and Task for each template

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view a specific asset email template, so that I can review its content before it is sent
acceptance_criteria: Given the asset email templates are listed; When I click View on a row such as Asset Assignment Email Notification; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the asset email templates list, so that I see the most current templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the latest data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch between the Email Templates and Notification Templates views, so that I can manage both channels for assets
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates view is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the asset email templates screen, so that I can return to the previous configuration page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Email Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I am navigated away without changes
